basic_details.job_title: DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Protection Officer, Outreach Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai (DCPU Sivagangai)
basic_details.short_information: The latest District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai (DCPU Sivagangai) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) and Outreach Worker posts! Published at www.sivagangai.nic.in, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the specified age group and possessing qualifications such as a Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management or any degree with relevant experience (for Protection Officer) and 12th P

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management, Any degree with 2 years experience in women and child development / social welfare works, 12th Pass
qualification.details: Protection Officer (Non-Institutional): Master's degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights (Public Administration) / Psychology / Mental Health / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized university OR any degree with 2 years experience in planning/implementation/monitoring/supervision of women and child development / social welfare works. Must have full proficiency in computer handling. Outreach Worker: 12th Pass. Preference to candidates with experience in child-related work.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sivagangai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026. These positions are for Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) and Outreach Worker.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional) post, candidates need a Master's degree in relevant fields or any degree with 2 years of experience in women and child development/social welfare works, along with computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Outreach Worker position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Outreach Worker position is Rs. 11,574/- per month on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Sivagangai, which is www.sivagangai.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the positions announced in the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for more information?
faq.answer: The official website for more information regarding the DCPU Sivagangai Recruitment 2026 and other government notifications is www.sivagangai.nic.in.
